name: tradeguard-strategy-skill
description: TradeGuard — a risk-gated, backtestable BSC trading-strategy Skill for BNB Hack (Track 2). Turns CoinMarketCap Fear & Greed + price momentum (RSI/MACD/trend regime) into long/flat entry/exit/size decisions, proves them with an event-driven backtest, and filters the tradeable universe with a read-only on-chain risk gate (liquidity, buy/sell tax, owner-mint/proxy/honeypot).
